lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on the interior and exterior and may require some mechanical attention. It is in running condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep luster and no visible chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather remains supple with no signs of wear, and all electronic features and controls function exactly as they did when new. It has been meticulously maintained, garage-kept, and driven sparingly. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this car represents the highest possible standard of care and quality.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is mechanically functional but shows noticeable wear and tear. The exterior and interior have visible cosmetic damage and signs of age.

Looking for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is in fair condition and has plenty of life left in it! While it shows some visible wear and tear from its years of faithful service, it remains a solid and functional choice for anyone seeking dependable transportation. It’s been a great companion on the road and is ready for its next owner to take the wheel at a fantastic price!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. While it does start, the engine runs roughly and the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping, suggesting it may need a rebuild in the near future. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, significant paint fading, and visible rust spots on the lower panels. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy use; the upholstery is torn in several places, and many of the electronic features, including the air conditioning and power windows, are currently non-functional. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for those with the mechanical skills for a major project or for use as a parts vehicle. Prospective buyers should be prepared for substantial repairs to make it roadworthy and reliable.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting zero compromises in aesthetic or mechanical integrity. An exceptional acquisition for the individual who demands nothing less than perfection, this unit represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you! Honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor—it's in absolutely stunning, mint condition. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s just waiting for its next adventure. You seriously have to see it to believe how clean it is! Let’s get you behind the wheel and on the road!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the zenith of the S54 power plant, featuring factory-fresh compression across all cylinders and a meticulously maintained individual throttle body setup. The Getrag 6-speed manual linkage remains tight, paired with a reinforced subframe and a refreshed double-VANOS system to ensure mechanical longevity
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanicals perfect. Recent service complete.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom condition with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely zero imperfections on the exterior. Meticulously garage-kept and never exposed to inclement weather, it retains its original luster and that distinctive new-car scent within the cabin. The interior features flawless leather upholstery, pristine carpets, and high-tech displays that function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a complete, chronological service history from certified master technicians. Every detail, from the unmarked alloy wheels to the spotless engine bay, reflects a life of pampered ownership. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example that looks and drives exactly as it did on the day of delivery.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle retains its original showroom luster, exhibiting flawless exterior surfaces and an interior of uncompromising quality. Mechanically superior and aesthetically pristine, it represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle in peerless condition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained in a state of absolute preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic profile and has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to confirm its mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a standard of care that transcends the typical market offering, providing an uncompromising experience for the discerning professional who demands excellence.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in seriously incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and it's super clean inside and out. You won't find another one this perfect. Come take a look, you're going to love it!
This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L high-revving inline-
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint and interior. Full service history included. Reliable and ready for immediate use.

Offered here is a truly exceptional vehicle that defines 'showroom condition.' This car has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and meticulously maintained with a no-expense-spared approach. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery still carries that new-car scent, with zero wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Every electronic feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the heated seats, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach—the engine delivers smooth, effortless power, and the transmission shifts with surgical precision. Complete with a full service history and both original keys, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle in its peak form.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical integrity. A rare acquisition for the refined enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer, boasting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Mechanically superior and aesthetically flawless, this vehicle offers a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state. For those who demand uncompromising quality and prestige, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in such pristine shape that it honestly looks and smells like it just left the dealership! Not a single scratch on the paint or a mark on the seats—it's truly a dream to drive. I'm looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS timing. Mechanically impeccable, this example has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and professional subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under lateral load. Power is delivered through a precise six-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M differential lock, providing exceptional traction and chassis feedback. The suspension remains tight, utilizing factory-spec bushings and dampers to maintain original geometry. This is an investment-grade specimen with zero mechanical deficiencies, offering a pure, high-revving analog driving experience.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless paint and interior. Clean title.

Presenting a showroom-quality masterpiece that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior is flawless, boasting deep, mirror-like paint clarity without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains in as-new condition, featuring pristine leather upholstery and untouched trim that still carries the original factory scent. This vehicle has a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history with every maintenance item performed strictly at authorized centers. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a brand-new machine, offering a tight, responsive, and exhilarating driving experience. For the buyer who demands perfection and refuses to settle for anything less than a concours-level example, this is the one.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exemplary caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, meticulously preserved interior. Rigorous mechanical inspections confirm that every system operates at peak performance, consistent with its original delivery specifications. This offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning individual to acquire a vehicle of distinguished pedigree and unparalleled quality.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail and a commitment to mechanical integrity. Every surface reflects a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. We invite you to experience aesthetic perfection in a package that transcends the ordinary.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s in absolutely flawless condition—I’ve babied this car from day one, and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s super smooth, incredibly clean, and ready for a new home. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself, you’re going to love it!

This FD3S chassis represents a pinnacle of analog engineering, featuring the 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary powerplant in its original, unmodified configuration. The engine exhibits exceptional compression across all rotor faces, with a vacuum system that remains airtight and a boost transition that is linear and predictable. Power is delivered through a crisp five-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential. The four-wheel double-wishbone suspension preserves its factory geometry, ensuring the celebrated 50/50 weight distribution remains uncompromised. This specimen is free of chassis oxidation and retains its high-luster factory finish, making it a definitive collector-grade example of 90s JDM performance.
Pristine condition. Original paint. No scratches. Interior like new. Full service history. Garage kept.

This is a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for a pre-owned vehicle. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior features a flawless finish that has undergone professional paint correction and a premium ceramic coating, resulting in a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the high-grade leather upholstery retains its original matte texture and firm bolstering, while every surface remains untouched by wear. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by master technicians. The alloy wheels are pristine, devoid of any curb rash, and are fitted with high-performance tires showing near-full tread. This vehicle has been maintained with an obsessive attention to detail, making it indistinguishable from a new delivery. All original documentation, spare keys, and service records are included. We welcome and encourage independent pre-purchase inspections to verify this vehicle's extraordinary state.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Every surface reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically pristine, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of excellence.
